name: Datadog Open Source Program
description: Free Datadog accounts for open source projects providing cloud observability and security monitoring. Used by the Apache Software Foundation, Python Software Foundation, ElectronJS, Ruby, and Linux Mint.

perks.title: Free Datadog Account
perks.description: Full access to Datadog's cloud observability and security platform at no cost for qualifying open source projects.

perks.title: Infrastructure Monitoring
perks.description: Monitor servers, containers, and cloud infrastructure with real-time dashboards and alerting.

perks.title: APM & Log Management
perks.description: Application performance monitoring, distributed tracing, and log management for your project's infrastructure.

eligibility: Must be an open source project that would benefit from cloud observability and security monitoring.
applicationProcess: Apply through the Datadog for Open Source Projects partner page.
